PeachyFang 桃牙芳

Hi there! I'm PeachyFang (桃牙芳) 🍑. Welcome to my peach garden! I'm a Bilibili content creator and livestreamer who loves singing, gaming, and sharing sweet moments with everyone.
你好！我是 PeachyFang 桃牙芳 🍑，欢迎光临我的蜜桃小窝！我是一名喜欢唱歌、打游戏和聊天的哔哩哔哩主播，很高兴在这里遇见你！

📺 Bilibili Livestream
